_comment: DhanwantariAI Sync Manifest — published to S3 by Bedrock agent daily

_notes: Clinical content (symptoms, tests, protocols, medicines) is always safe to replace.
There is no user-authored data here — server copy is always canonical.
Delta preferred over full download when available.
If offline >90 days, force full re-download (delta chain too long).
Historical session records (what a health worker showed 3 weeks ago) are NEVER retroactively
updated — the price shown at session time was correct at that time.
New sessions after sync always use the latest prices.
Session records store price_catalog_version alongside the price so audits are always accurate.

model_weights.changelog: Improved accuracy on V10 sexual health diseases; better Ayurvedic recommendations.

sync_policy.prompt_message_en: A better version of DhanwantariAI is available. Download on Wi-Fi? (500 MB)
sync_policy.prompt_message_hi: DhanwantariAI का बेहतर संस्करण उपलब्ध है। Wi-Fi पर डाउनलोड करें? (500 MB)
_notes: User must explicitly confirm — a 500MB download on a rural health worker's data plan is costly.
Old weights remain active until new download completes and passes checksum verification.
If user is on low-end device (< 2GB RAM), this prompt is suppressed — rule engine runs instead.
If user has deferred for > max_defer_days, prompt again on next launch.

health_worker_offline_rules._description: Rules applied when device comes online after extended offline period

8_to_30_days.model_weights: notify if update available — defer allowed

31_to_90_days.disease_db: apply full JSON silently (delta chain too stale)
31_to_90_days.model_weights: notify — show staleness warning in app until updated

over_90_days.disease_db: force full JSON replace — show toast: 'Clinical database updated'
over_90_days.model_weights: show prominent banner: model is significantly outdated
over_90_days.session_records: never touch — all historical records preserved as-is

session_record_policy._description: What happens to locally stored diagnostic session records during any sync
session_record_policy.rule: IMMUTABLE — session records are never modified by any sync operation
rationale: A health worker showed ₹32 for Cefixime on 10-Feb. That was correct on 10-Feb.
If price changes to ₹38, the Feb session stays at ₹32 — that is the historical truth.
Each session record stores: price_catalog_version, disease_db_version, model_weights_version.
This allows full audit trail: 'what data was this recommendation based on?'

session_record_schema_additions.disease_db_version: string — version of disease_db active when session ran
session_record_schema_additions.price_catalog_version: string — version of price catalog active when session ran
session_record_schema_additions.model_weights_version: string or null — 'rule_engine' if LLM not available
session_record_schema_additions.synced_at_start_of_session: ISO8601 timestamp of last successful sync before this session
